title: STM32 substrate — per-project descriptor
description: Per-project descriptor stm32-project.jsonc. One per project folder (SC-002). Loaded by SubstrateContext.from_environment() and validated against this schema at load time (M-016). Fields cross-reference the per-tool API specs' Schema additions sections.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for IDE validation; substrate ignores.

version.description: Schema version. Pinned to 1 for v1.

project_name.description: Project identifier used in log lines and error messages.

board.description: Board descriptor (advisory; ground truth for board-name resolution is firmware.board).

firmware.description: Firmware artifact + target descriptor fields. Consumed across cubeprogrammer / cubeide / cubemx / debug / vcp / signing.

flash_address.description: Flash base address; hex literal with 0x prefix (SC-003).

device_family.description: Family prefix like STM32L4, STM32H7, STM32N6 for FPU detection (cubeide preset-fast per MR-1) and signing default. Optional; substrate falls back to soft-float / no-auto-align when unset.

board.description: Board name e.g. 'nucleo-l476rg'. Consumed by vcp multi-probe auto-match (MR-2) and downstream slash-command routing.

uart_baud.description: Default VCP baud rate. Substrate fallback: 115200 when unset.

uart_terminator.description: Line terminator for VCP.send_and_read(). Substrate fallback: \n when unset.

uart_parity.description: Expected UART parity for DIAG-011 host-vs-device parity match check.

expected_sysclk_mhz.description: Expected SYSCLK in MHz for DIAG-003 clock-tree verification.

cpu_freq_mhz.description: CPU frequency used to drive SWO sampling in tail_swo (VCP-007).

expected_option_bytes.description: Expected option byte values for DIAG-018 verification; keys are OB names (device-specific).

images.description: Image list for F-008 / F-009 dual-image flash flows.

external_loader.description: Path to .stldr external loader for F-010 / F-015 flows.

build.description: CubeIDE headless build descriptor. Consumed by cubeide module.

artifact.description: Expected ELF artifact path relative to project + configuration build dir.

modify_all_configurations.description: If true, .cproject settings edits apply across all configs; otherwise active configuration only (cubeide-api Q6).

debug.description: Debug-session descriptor consumed by debug module.

elf_path.description: Default ELF for Debug.start_session() when caller does not pass elf_path.

cubemx.description: CubeMX generation descriptor consumed by cubemx module.

project_name.description: Name embedded in the generated project.

toolchain.description: Generated-project toolchain. v1 supports STM32CubeIDE only per cubemx-api Q2.
